channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: South Korean submarine visit to B.C. coincides with Hanwha’s defence sales push
item.description: A South Korean submarine has arrived in British Columbia, drawing attention as defence company Hanwha intensifies its efforts to promote submarine sales. The visit is framed within broader industry an...

item.title: PDP affirms 37 consensus candidates for Benue State House of Assembly elections
item.description: The Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) in Benue State has affirmed a total of 37 consensus candidates for the upcoming State House of Assembly elections. Among those confirmed is the immediate past Speake...

item.title: Concerns rise over Elon Musk’s shifting stance on terrestrial solar energy amid push for space-based power
item.description: A recent TechCrunch analysis examines whether Elon Musk has effectively abandoned his earlier commitment to solar power and a fully electrified, renewable energy economy on Earth. Tesla’s “Master Plan...

item.title: Katsina Police Arrest Seven Suspected Kidnappers, Recover ₦7.5m Ransom Proceeds
item.description: Operatives of the Katsina State Police Command don successfully bust a seven-man kidnapping syndicate suspected to be behind the abduction of an eight-year-old boy in Katsina metropolis. The operation...

item.title: Xavier School Alumni Organize Golf Tournament to Support Former Teachers
item.description: A golf tournament organized by Xavier School alumni is set to raise funds and provide support for former teachers of the school. The initiative highlights the continued appreciation and gratitude of a...

item.title: Festus Mogae remembered for democratic leadership, media openness and accountability in Botswana
item.description: The article reflects on the leadership legacy of former Botswana president Festus Mogae, who died on May 8, and highlights the qualities that made him stand out among African leaders. Written by forme...

item.title: Rico Verhoeven pushes Oleksandr Usyk in competitive WBC heavyweight title fight at the Pyramids of Giza
item.description: Oleksandr Usyk defended his WBC heavyweight title against kickboxing champion Rico Verhoeven in a highly unusual crossover bout staged at the Pyramids of Giza in Egypt. The live coverage described an ...

item.title: Rajasthan government announces fuel-saving austerity measures amid West Asia conflict
item.description: The Government of Rajasthan has introduced a set of austerity measures aimed at reducing fuel consumption and curbing public expenditure, citing the ongoing conflict in West Asia as a contributing glo...

item.title: An argument for embracing eccentricity and accommodating unconventional behaviour
item.description: In this opinion column, Ndumiso Ngcobo reflects on the nature of eccentricity and how society often labels people who behave or think differently as “weird”. He begins with a humorous personal anecdot...

item.title: A Look Back at Victoria Principal’s Early Career in the 1970s
item.description: This article presents a curated collection of 30 photographs highlighting American actress Victoria Principal during her early career in the 1970s, a formative decade that shaped her path to internati...

item.title: Internal backlash emerges among Trump supporters over reported U.S.–Iran peace framework
item.description: A reported emerging peace framework involving the United States, Iran, and a coalition of Arab and Muslim nations has sparked significant backlash among some of Donald Trump’s most vocal supporters. T...

item.title: Man shot dead near White House after gunfire prompts lockdown and security response
item.description: The White House in Washington was placed into lockdown after gunshots were fired near its perimeter on Saturday evening, triggering a major security response from the Secret Service and causing journa...

item.title: Orlando Pirates chase league title and possible domestic treble in final match at Mbombela
item.description: Orlando Pirates are on the brink of a potentially historic achievement as they head into their final Betway Premiership fixture against Orbit College at Mbombela Stadium. A victory on Saturday would s...

item.title: Mary Lou McDonald Backs Sinn Féin Candidate Janice Boylan Despite Tight Dublin Central By-Election Race
item.description: Sinn Féin leader Mary Lou McDonald defended her party’s decision to select Janice Boylan as its candidate in the Dublin Central by-election after early vote tallies placed Boylan in second place behin...

item.title: KZN RTI arrests driver allegedly travelling at 222km/h despite pressure from political connections
item.description: The KwaZulu-Natal Road Traffic Inspectorate (RTI) has confirmed the arrest of a motorist accused of driving at 222km/h in a 120km/h zone during a law enforcement operation on a provincial highway. Acc...

item.title: A Retrospective on Greta Plattry’s Influence on American Sportswear and Knit Fashion of the 1950s
item.description: The article explores the career and lasting fashion legacy of Greta Plattry, a German-American designer celebrated for her refined sportswear and knitwear during the 1940s and 1950s. Born in Berlin in...

item.title: Oleksandr Usyk stops Rico Verhoeven in late controversial finish to retain WBC title
item.description: Oleksandr Usyk retained his WBC heavyweight title after a dramatic and contentious late stoppage victory over kickboxing star Rico Verhoeven, who was competing in only his second professional boxing b...

item.title: Peel police step up security at public events following fireworks-related violence over long weekend
item.description: Peel Regional Police have announced an increased security presence at public events following disturbing incidents over the recent long weekend in which individuals reportedly used fireworks against o...

item.title: Four women appointed to simultaneously head High Courts in India for the first time
item.description: In a historic development for the Indian judiciary, four High Courts in the country are set to be headed by women Chief Justices simultaneously for the first time. This milestone follows the Supreme C...

item.title: Centre reviews state readiness for rollout of VB-GRAM G rural employment law from July 1
item.description: The Ministry of Rural Development (MoRD) on Saturday reviewed the preparedness of states and Union Territories for the implementation of the Viksit Bharat–Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gr...
